group_overview.title: Group product
group_overview.description: Group similar products to share and display reviews together, streamline bundles, and create custom review displays effortlessly.
group_overview.delete_group_message: If you delete the group, all reviews will be separated and revert to their original products. You will no longer have access, and this action cannot be undone. Do you want to continue?
group_overview.limit_function: Upgrade to higher plan to use this feature. <1>See pricing</1>

create_group_page.title: Create group product
create_group_page.sub_description: Select product to add to this group
create_group_page.unsaved_change_title: Are you sure you want to exit?
create_group_page.unsaved_change_message: Your group hasn't been saved. If you exit, your settings will be lost. Do you want to continue?

group_detail_page.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this product?
